description: They are currently running a LaunchDarkly trial.
nextStepsDetails:
03/27 - CF Received final approval from Jeff (CTO). Docusign and final quote sent over. Once we get the signature I will CW this opp.
03/24 - CF Quotes sent over to Conner (VP) and Jeff (CTO) for final approvals - call scheduled Friday to discuss
03/20 - CF Second pricing call with team - 33,750 will be final offer - VP and CTO asked for quotes to be sent over for both 1 yr and 3 yr
03/13 - Pricing call with Vantaca team - SC total will be updated and sent over to us. Price point will change upon new number. Call scheduled for 03/18 to discuss new price point. Deal updated to 35k iARR
02/28 CF - Trial extended until 03/21 as commercial conversations kick off. Pricing call scheduled for 03/13
02/05 CF - Weekly syncs scheduled for every Friday with Scott S from LaunchX - Support them during the trial/POV process
02/03 CF Agreed on extending trial to end of Feb - Working session was useful and they were wowed by product/experimentation capabilities - setting up weekly office hours during trial process to keep momentum/help with any questions that come up
02/02 CF Working session scheduled with Vantaca team for 02/03 - Scott + Matt as technical experts
01/30 CF Schedule joint working session with LaunchDarkly SE + LaunchX (Experimentation Expert) to support Vantaca's 2-3 month POC. Goal is to finalize experimentation setup, validate architecture, and launch first production-facing experiment within ~2 weeks
businessImpactNotes: They need to discuss pricing as soon as possible and want to schedule a call to move things forward. Their VP of Engineering and Product Manager would like to join the discussion to evaluate production readiness and next steps.
